target_release.canonical_authority: GitHub Release asset from SmartHausGroup/M365 tag com.smarthaus.m365-v0.1.2

decision.summary: GitHub Release from main is the canonical M365 Integration Pack distribution authority.
decision.ucp_admission_role: UCP must admit by release tag, release asset, checksum, manifest, and provenance.

governing_formula: ReleaseReady(0.1.2) = SourceClean and BranchPromoted and TagPointsToMain and GitHubReleaseOwnsAssets and DownloadVerifies and ExtractsWithoutSourceRepo and RuntimeAcceptancePasses and LocalStoreIsCacheOfRelease and UcpHandoffReferencesRelease and EvidenceSynchronized

requirements.title: Formal closure plan and Claude handoff
requirements.acceptance: Plan triplet, prompt pair, execution plan, file index, and action log exist and point to the GitHub Release closure path.

requirements.title: Preflight and governance-truth reconciliation
requirements.acceptance: Correct repo/branch/remote are proven and active review-truth conflicts are closed before promotion.

requirements.title: Development branch verification and push
requirements.acceptance: Development gates pass and origin/development contains the verified release source.

requirements.title: Staging promotion and verification
requirements.acceptance: Staging contains the verified development commit and staging gates pass.

requirements.title: Main promotion and clean release build
requirements.acceptance: Main contains the verified staging commit and clean-main rebuild freezes release assets.

requirements.title: Tag and draft GitHub Release
requirements.acceptance: Tag com.smarthaus.m365-v0.1.2 points to main release commit and draft release contains required assets.

requirements.title: Downloaded release verification and publish
requirements.acceptance: Downloaded release assets verify, extract, and import without source repo; release is published non-draft.

requirements.title: UCP handoff and tracker closeout
requirements.acceptance: M365-side UCP handoff references GitHub Release assets and all trackers are synchronized.

chunks.title: Clean Main Rebuild And Release Asset Freeze
Create Draft GitHub Release And Upload Assets

hard_boundaries: Do not mutate UCP or sibling repos.
Do not move an existing release tag without explicit CTO approval.
Do not publish from a dirty worktree.
Do not log secrets, tokens, device codes, auth codes, refresh tokens, client secrets, private keys, subject object IDs, or phone numbers.
acceptance_criteria: origin/development contains verified 0.1.2 source and evidence.
origin/staging contains the verified release source.
origin/main contains the verified release source.
tag com.smarthaus.m365-v0.1.2 points to final main release commit.
GitHub Release exists and is non-draft.
downloaded release assets verify with SHA256SUMS.
downloaded release bundle extracts and imports without source repo paths.
local IntegrationPacks is documented as cache/install copy.
UCP handoff references the GitHub Release URL and exact hashes.
